overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a survival horror game showing a character in a green jacket exploring a fog-shrouded wooden boardwalk in a lakeside park. The character walks past vintage park fixtures, enters a gazebo at the pier's end, and returns through the thick atmospheric mist with muted colors and diffused lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: park entrance boardwalk with iron fencing

agents.ego_description: walking away from the park entrance sign along the foggy wooden boardwalk

notable_agents.action: woman in pink jacket and black skirt standing still, watching the character pass by

entered.detail: black metal arch sign with white text reading 'Lakeview Park' at the entrance
ornate black metal fence with stone pillars marking the park boundary
weathered wooden planks forming the main walking path over the water
classic black ornate street lamp with glass enclosure

segments.scene_description: The segment opens at the entrance to Lakeview Park, with the character walking away from an ornate iron gate and park sign. A woman in a pink jacket stands to the left watching as the character proceeds along the foggy wooden boardwalk. Vintage lamp posts line the path ahead, barely visible through the thick mist.

scene_state.functional_zone: open lakeside promenade with viewing areas

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the boardwalk past benches and coin-operated viewers

entered.detail: wooden slatted bench facing the water for visitors to sit
metal binocular viewer on a stand for observing the lake
festive light bulbs strung on wires above the boardwalk
red and white weathered sign warning against swimming

segments.scene_description: The character walks along the open boardwalk section, passing wooden benches and coin-operated viewers positioned for lake observation. String lights hang overhead between vintage lamp posts, and a weathered warning sign becomes visible on the right. The fog remains thick, obscuring the water beyond the wooden railings.

scene_state.functional_zone: octagonal gazebo at the end of the pier

events.description: character walks from the open boardwalk into the covered wooden gazebo structure
character stops at the gazebo railing to look out at the fog-obscured water

agents.ego_description: walking onto the narrow pier section, entering the gazebo, and pausing to look at the water view

notable_agents.action: Maria standing inside the gazebo near the entrance, watching the character

entered.detail: octagonal wooden pavilion with open sides and a peaked roof at the pier's end
red metal box mounted on a post containing emergency flotation devices
red metal newspaper vending machine on the boardwalk

segments.scene_description: The boardwalk narrows as the character approaches the wooden gazebo at the pier's end. After entering the octagonal structure, the character pauses to look out at the foggy water. Maria appears briefly inside the gazebo. The space is sheltered with string lights now hanging from the interior roof beams.

scene_state.functional_zone: return path with food vendor area

events.description: character turns around and begins walking back toward the park entrance

agents.ego_description: walking back along the boardwalk away from the gazebo toward the park entrance

entered.detail: red food vending cart with striped umbrella canopy
black metal patio chairs and tables arranged for outdoor dining
small blue wooden building with service window, likely for park entry tickets

segments.scene_description: Having reached the pier's end, the character turns and walks back along the boardwalk. A food cart with a striped umbrella and outdoor seating appears on the right, followed by a blue ticket booth on the left. The fog continues to limit visibility as the character retraces their steps.

scene_state.functional_zone: park entrance with ticket booths and signage

agents.ego_description: approaching the park entrance gates and ticket booths at the end of the boardwalk

entered.detail: black metal arch sign with white text reading 'Rosewater Park'
small buildings with windows for park admission

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character approaching the park entrance area, with the 'Rosewater Park' sign becoming visible on the left. Ticket booths stand ahead at the boardwalk's end, and the wrought iron fencing from the beginning reappears. The foggy atmosphere persists throughout the return journey.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey from the entrance of a fog-shrouded park to the end of a lakeside pier and back again. It begins as the character walks away from an ornate iron gate and a park sign, passing a woman in a pink jacket while moving deeper into a thick mist lined with vintage lamp posts. As the camera proceeds along the open boardwalk, the scene shifts past wooden benches and coin-operated viewers before narrowing into a sheltered octagonal gazebo where the character pauses beside Maria to look out at the obscured water. The movement then reverses, retracing the path past a striped food cart and a blue ticket booth as the fog continues to mute the surrounding colors. Finally, the journey concludes as the character returns to the park entrance, where the Rosewater Park sign and wrought iron fencing reappear through the persistent haze.
